2334300.name: SoulJah Kingdom Rise
2334300.description:
Souljah Kingdom Rise is a narrative focused 3rd person cover shooter with emphasis on player progression and customisation

There are two distinct gameplay loops; explorable sandbox areas, as well as more linear missions, similar to a traditional campaign experience.

Souljah Kingdom Rise will offer the player in-depth customisation choices, not only in gameplay, but also with it's accessibility. 

Souljah Kingdom Rise is based in the heart of Jamaica set in the year 2060.

The setting is a unique feature about our project as well as its heritage and traditions which will all be present within the environment. We will be using prominent folklore stories from Jamaica which is embedded within the very foundation of the progression system.

This will be the first look at the franchise which will be further developed.

Key Features:

  • Explorable gameplay space with secrets to find.

  • 3rd Person Shooter gameplay in a vibrant tropical yet modern environment.

  • Detailed progression system based on Jamaican and African folklore. 

  • Minimal immersive UI.

  • Achievements to earn.
2334300.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
